## Summary

Explain what changed and why.

## Verification

List the commands or manual checks used to verify the change.

## Screenshots

Add before/after images for visible UI changes, with private information removed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated generated files.
- [ ] Tests or build checks pass locally.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation are updated when needed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private paths, or personal data are included.
